title: grumilea urdanetensis
intro: Grumilea urdanetensis, also known as Philippine grumilea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grumilea urdanetensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Grumilea urdanetensis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
